title: ericoides unibracteatum
intro: Ericoides unibracteatum, also known as the single-bracted Ericoides or single-bracted Mountain Heath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ericoides unibracteatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture or extract form.
